---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: assignments
  sort: "date asc"
  fields: [title, date]
---

Welcome!  
This is my portfolio for learning **R, data analysis, GitHub, and Quarto**. Click the links below to see the assignments I have worked on throughout the semester that touch on these topics.

## Course Lessons
- [Introduction to Literate Analysis using Quarto](assignments/a01_quarto_literate_analysis.html)
- [Tidy Data](assignments/a02.html)
- [Data Visualization](intro-to-spatial-data.html)
